title: armeria vulgaris var. purpurea
intro: Armeria vulgaris var. purpurea, also known as the purple thrift or sea thrift, is a perennial plant species in the family Plumbaginaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Armeria vulgaris var. purpurea include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting respiratory health. Armeria vulgaris var. purpurea can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in homeopathic remedies.
